zh.lifeSummary: 當Peter Hephner於1806年1月6日出生在美國賓夕法尼亞州時，他的父親Johann Jacob Hopffner "Hephner"50歲，母親Maria Dorothea Shoemaker49歲。他與Ann Mariah Marshall在美國俄亥俄州克林頓特 姆姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1860年住在美國威斯康辛州武塔加米。他去世於1863年10月12日在美國威斯康辛州武塔加米麥可維爾享年57歲，埋葬在美國威斯康辛州武塔加米麥可維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Peter Hephner于1806年1月6日出生在美国宾夕法尼亚州时，他的父亲Johann Jacob Hopffner "Hephner"50岁，母亲Maria Dorothea Shoemaker49岁。他与Ann Mariah Marshall在美国俄亥俄州克林頓特 姆姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1860年住在美国威斯康辛州武塔加米。他去世于1863年10月12日在美国威斯康辛州武塔加米麥可維爾享年57岁，埋葬在美国威斯康辛州武塔加米麥可維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Hephner
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form, under classical influence, of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Heffner  .

variants.name: Heffner
meanings: South German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a potter (see   Hafner  ).

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Harrisburg Becomes the State Capital
historicEvents.description: Harrisburg had important parts with migration, the Civil War, and the Industrial Revolution.
historicEvents.urlTitle: United States History-History of Harrisburg Pennsylvania

historicEvents.title: The Crimes Act
historicEvents.description: The Crimes Act was made to provide a clearer punishment of certain crimes against the United States. Part of it includes: Changing the maximum sentence of imprisonment to be increased from seven to ten years and changing the maximum fine from $5,000 to $10,000.

American settlers began mining the Wisconsin Territory in the early 1800's. The lead ore in the territory had largely been mined previously by American Indians. By 1829, nearly 4,000 miners had moved to Wisconsin Territory. The miners became known as badgers as they burrowed into hillsides for shelter. The name eventually represented the state and Wisconsin is now known as the Badger State. (Wisconsin Historical Society: Lead Mining in Southwestern Wisconsin)
U.S. acquires vast tracts of Mexican territory in wake of Mexican War including California and New Mexico.

historicEvents.title: The Creation of the Republican Party
historicEvents.description: A debate continues over the location of the creation of the Republican Party. Some sources claim that the party was formed in Ripon, Wisconsin, on February 28, 1854. Others claim the first meeting of the Republican Party took place in Jackson, Michigan, on July 6, 1854, where the Republican Party was officially organized. Over 1,000 people were present and candidates were selected for the party, thus making it the first Republican convention.

historicEvents.title: Battle of Gettysburg
historicEvents.description: The three day Battle of Gettysburg was one of the bloodiest of the American Civil War. Between the Confederates and Unions, somewhere between 46,000 and 51,000 people died that day.

en.lifeSummary: When Peter Hephner was born on 6 January 1806, in Pennsylvania, United States, his father, Johann Jacob Hopffner "Hephner", was 50 and his mother, Maria Dorothea Shoemaker, was 49. He married Ann Mariah Marshall in Center MM, Clinton, Ohio, United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. He lived in Outagamie, Wisconsin, United States in 1860. He died on 12 October 1863, in Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, United States, at the age of 57, and was buried in Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Peter Hephner est né le 6 janvier 1806, à Pennsylvanie, États-Unis, son père, Johann Jacob Hopffner "Hephner", avait 50 ans et sa mère, Maria Dorothea Shoemaker, avait 49 ans. Il a épousé Ann Mariah Marshall à Center MM, Clinton, Ohio, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Il a vécu à Outagamie, Wisconsin, États-Unis en 1860. Il est décédé le 12 octobre 1863, à Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, États-Unis, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterré à Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Peter Hephner am 6. Januar 1806 in Pennsylvania, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war sein Vater Johann Jacob Hopffner "Hephner" 50 und seine Mutter Maria Dorothea Shoemaker 49. Er hat in Center MM, Clinton, Ohio, Vereinigte Staaten Ann Mariah Marshall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1860 hat er in Outagamie, Wisconsin, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. Er starb am 12. Oktober 1863 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Hephner è nato il il 6 gennaio 1806 nel Pennsylvania, Stati Uniti d'America, il suo padre, Johann Jacob Hopffner "Hephner", aveva 50 anni e il suo madre, Maria Dorothea Shoemaker, aveva 49 anni. Lui sposato Ann Mariah Marshall nel Center MM, Clinton, Ohio, Stati Uniti d'America. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Vissuto a Outagamie, Wisconsin, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1860. Morì il 12 ottobre 1863, nel Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Stati Uniti d'America, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolto a Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.lifeSummary: Peter Hephnerが1806年1月6日にアメリカ合衆国ペンシルベニア州で生まれた時，父Johann Jacob Hopffner "Hephner"は50歳，母Maria Dorothea Shoemakerは49歳であった。アメリカ合衆国オハイオ州クリントンセンター ンムでAnn Mariah Marshallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1860年にはアメリカ合衆国ウィスコンシン州オウタガミに住んでいた。彼は1863年10月12日にアメリカ合衆国ウィスコンシン州オウタガミマクヴィルで57歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国ウィスコンシン州オウタガミマクヴィルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Peter Hephner(이)가 1806년 1월 6일 미국 펜실베이니아 주에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Johann Jacob Hopffner "Hephner"(은)는 50세였고, 그의 어머니 Maria Dorothea Shoemaker(은)는 49세였다. 그는 미국 오하이오 주 클린턴 세터에서 Ann Mariah Marshall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1860년도에 미국 위스콘신 주 우타갬이에서 살았다. 그는 1863년 10월 12일 미국 위스콘신 주 우타갬이 맥k빌에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 위스콘신 주 우타갬이 맥k빌에 묻혔다.

pt.6 JAN 1806–12 OCT 1863: 6 de janeiro de 1806–12 de outubro de 1863
pt.Center Ohio: Center MM, Clinton, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Peter Hephner nasceu em 6 de janeiro de 1806, em Pensilvânia, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Johann Jacob Hopffner "Hephner", tinha 50 anos e sua mãe, Maria Dorothea Shoemaker, tinha 49 anos. Ele casou-se com Ann Mariah Marshall em Center MM, Clinton, Ohio, Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele viveu em Outagamie, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos da América em 1860. Ele faleceu em 12 de outubro de 1863, em Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos da América, com 57 anos, e foi sepultado em Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Center Ohio: кентир мм, клинтон, Огайо, Соединенные штаты
ru.Green Bay,Brown Co. WI: грин беи, бравн, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты
ru.Center Twp. Columbiana Co. OH: кентир тоуншип, колумбяна, Огайо, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Peter Hephner родился 6 января 1806 г. в местности Пенсильвания, Соединенные штаты, его отцу по имени Johann Jacob Hopffner "Hephner" было 50 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria Dorothea Shoemaker, 49. Он женился на женщине по имени Ann Mariah Marshall в местности кентир мм, клинтон, Огайо, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Он жил в местности оутагэими, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты в 1860 году. Он умер 12 октября 1863 г. в местности макквилл, оутагэими, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 57 лет и был похоронен в местности макквилл, оутагэими, Висконсин, Соединенные штаты.

es.Center Twp. Columbiana Co. OH: Center Township, Columbiana, Ohio, Estados Unidos
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Peter Hephner nació el 6 de enero de 1806, en Pensilvania, Estados Unidos, su papá, Johann Jacob Hopffner "Hephner", tenía 50 años y su mamá, Maria Dorothea Shoemaker, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Ann Mariah Marshall en Center MM, Clinton, Ohio, Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Vivió en Outagamie, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos en 1860. Murió el 12 de octubre de 1863, en Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultado en Mackville, Outagamie, Wisconsin, Estados Unidos.
